activities.title: Inject System Prompt Identity
activities.description: Select correct system prompt variant based on session mode (interactive / agent-SDK / pure-agent). Prepend to system block if not present. Filter empty text blocks.

activities.title: Prefix Tool Names
activities.description: Add mcp_ prefix to all tool names in tools array definitions. Add mcp_ prefix to tool_use blocks in messages content. Guard against double-prefix. Filter empty text blocks from messages.

activities.title: Compute Attribution Header
activities.description: Build x-anthropic-billing-header value: cc_version=VERSION.HASH; cc_entrypoint=ENTRYPOINT; cch=00000;[ cc_workload=WORKLOAD;]. Compute HASH from last user message per official algorithm. Read ENTRYPOINT from env. Conditionally include cc_workload.

activities.title: Assemble Request Headers
activities.description: Set: Authorization (Bearer token), anthropic-version (2023-06-01), Content-Type (application/json), User-Agent (claude-code/VERSION), anthropic-beta (merged required + additional + incoming), x-organization-uuid (if orgID), x-anthropic-billing-header (from A33).

activities.title: Scrub Prohibited Headers
activities.description: Remove: x-api-key, anthropic-client, x-app, x-opencode-tools-debug, x-opencode-account-id, session_id. These headers trigger Anthropic non-Claude-Code detection.

activities.title: Rewrite Request URL
activities.description: Normalize path: relative → https://api.anthropic.com/v1/PATH. Append ?beta=true to /v1/messages endpoint (skip if already present).

activities.title: Serialize Wire-Format Body
activities.description: JSON-stringify the transformed body (after system prompt, tool prefix, empty block filter). This is the final body bytes sent over the wire.
